mapper.select: SELECT permission_id, permission_title, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM PERMISSION WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT permission_id, permission_title, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM PERMISSION WHERE permission_id = #{permissionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM PERMISSION WHERE permission_title = #{permissionTitle} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PERMISSION (permission_title, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{permissionTitle}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE PERMISSION SET permission_title = #{permissionTitle}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE permission_id = #{permissionId}
